SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT CANOPY ENERGY CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-19-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOAN ALLEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CANOPY ENERGY CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIO PATINI, EMPLOYEE. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT SHE WAS UNSURE WHETHER TO WAIVE THE AMOUNT ABOVE $10,000 REGARDING ISSUES WITH HER INSURANCE CLAIM. DEFENDANT PRESENT STATES THAT HE IS NOT THE CORRECT PARTY EVEN THOUGH THE NAME IS THE SAME, HOWEVER THE PARTIES HAVE DIFFERENT CONTRACTOR LIC NUMBERS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO EITHER/OR SERVE THE PARTY WITH THE CORRECT CONTRACTORS LIC NUMBER AND/OR AGREE TO WAIVING AMOUNT ABOVE $10K. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-28-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE CANOPY ENERGY CALIFORNIA. PARTY ALREADY SERVED HAS SAME NAME BUT DIFFERENT CONTRACTOR NUMBER. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. CANOPY ENERGY CALIFORNIA WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIO PATINI. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLEN, JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT CANOPY ENERGY CALIFORNIA

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Joan Allen appeared in pro per.
Appellant/Defendant Canopy Energy California appeared in pro per represented by Jordan Cohen.
Appellant/Defendant Energy Enterprises USA, Inc. dba Canopy Energy appeared in pro per represented by Jordan Cohen.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties and witness for Respondent Stacey Kuch sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Joan Allen testified on her own behalf.
Stacey Kuch testified on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff Joan Allen.
Jordan Cohen testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendants Canopy Energy California and Energy Enterprises USA, Inc. dba Canopy Energy.

Respondent's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Robert Aune; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Continued To Jun-28-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Continued To Apr-19-19 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
